title: Angular Momentum of a Wind Turbine
body: The blades of a wind turbine are $$30$$ $$m$$ in length and rotate at a maximum rotation rate of $$20$$ $$\frac{rev}{min}$$. The blades are $$6000$$ kg each and the rotor assembly has three blades (model each blade as a uniform rod rotating about one end, I=(1/3)*m*L**2).
